title: VIROCAPSID cage output (V-R1) v0 — LOCKED 2026-05-12
description: Cage spec emitted per cell (T-number + subunit_count + assembly_kinetics + yield_curve + witness_ref). GATE-26-V-R1 (C5) schema lock LANDED 2026-05-12 ahead of 2026-07-28 deadline; field-set frozen at v_r1_cage_output_v0. Future evolution (rate-constant strata, multi-T fields) → cage_output_v2.schema.json (cycle 28+). 4-cell conformance fixtures at virocapsid/spec/examples/cage_output_v0__{aml,scd,pancov,senolytic}.json (validated by selftest/virocapsid_c5_conformance.py, wired into selftest/run_all.sh). Reference: .roadmap.virocapsid Draft 2026-05-06 (§STALLED V-R1); AXIS_CLOSURE_PLAN.md §5.

lock_metadata.raw_91_c3_disclose: Lock = field-set freeze + 4-cell example validation. Live witness emission (raw_77_v_r1_cage_output_v0 rows from running simulator) remains out-of-repo (R5 sunset → ~/core/nexus/sim_bridge/); fixtures here are schema-conformance demonstrations, not therapeutic claims.

schema.description: Schema version tag — locked v0 under GATE-26-V-R1.

t_number.description: Caspar-Klug triangulation number T (1, 3, 4, 7, 13, 21, ...). T=1 only is STRUCTURAL-EXACT; T>=3 is calibrated (V-R2 stretch).

subunit_count.description: Total protein subunits = 60 * T (T=1 -> 60, T=3 -> 180, T=4 -> 240).

vertex_count.description: Pentameric vertex count. Always 12 by Euler V-E+F=2 + icosahedral symmetry; hex faces vary with T.

rate_constants.description: Stability-corner rate constants per T-number. T=1 STNV: K12=1e-6, K21=1e-4, K_CLOSE=1e-7, K_OPEN=1e-14.

integrator.description: ODE integrator. backward_euler chosen for stiffness in K_OPEN regime.

t_grid.description: Time points (arbitrary units; STNV reference uses 0..10000).

y_closed.description: Closed-shell yield fraction at each t_grid point. y_closed[-1] >= 0.85 required for cell DoD.

y_aberrant.description: Optional: aberrant-aggregate yield. Used by F-VIROCAPSID-4-b ratio criterion.

witness_ref.description: Pointer to witness row in registry. Format: state/discovery_absorption/registry.jsonl#raw_77_<slug>_v<n>.
